final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Xiaohongshu cover image announcing the launch of GPT-image-2 on the Lovart platform, with a high-end editorial magazine aesthetic.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover, bold graphic design
Composition: diagonal composition — key visual elements and typography arranged along a strong diagonal axis
Subject: launch announcement of GPT-image-2 on Lovart platform, with prominent display of both brand names
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: high contrast, sharp and dramatic to reinforce the accent color emphasis
Color palette: high-contrast with a strong accent color (e.g., electric or neon accent against a near-black or stark white base)
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: both "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" must appear as legible typographic elements; diagonal layout must be clearly visible; image must work as a Xiaohongshu cover (portrait 3:4 ratio)
Avoid: cluttered layout, soft pastel tones, generic social-media template look, gradients that reduce contrast
